title: The Girl with the Golden Eyes
writer: Pierre Pelegri, Philippe Dumarçay, Honoré de Balzac
actors: Marie Laforêt, Paul Guers, Françoise Prévost
plot: A skirt-chasing fashion photographer meets a charming young woman who captures his interest immediately. She is not wholly forthcoming, but after a period of time, he realizes that he is in love with her - she is not just another ...
